name: Sagaing Region (Myanmar)
description: A horizontal tricolour of yellow, blue, and red bearing the seal of Sagaing Region.
history: Used by the Sagaing Region government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the regional emblem of Sagaing Region, charged in the centre of the tricolour
